title: Introducing IMAP Email Connector for monday.com
excerpt: Transform the way you manage emails and automate workflows with our latest addition to the monday.com marketplace: IMAP Email Connector! Designed to seamlessly integrate your IMAP email accounts with monday.com, this pow…

posts.author: idodekov (Iliyan Dodekov (Deview Studios))
posts.cookedHtml:
Transform the way you manage emails and automate workflows with our latest addition to the monday.com marketplace: IMAP Email Connector! Designed to seamlessly integrate your IMAP email accounts with monday.com, this powerful app ensures that your team stays updated in real-time. With easy-to-use integration templates, you can automatically create items, send updates, and manage workflows with just a few clicks. When you receive an email, the app can automatically create new items or post updates on your boards, keeping your team informed and efficient.

Key Features:

Inbound Email Automations: Automatically create new items or post updates in your monday.com boards when emails arrive in your IMAP inbox. All relevant email content is added as updates to the new item, so your team never misses critical information.

Outbound Email Automations: Set automations to send emails whenever a status changes or a new item is created. Customize email recipients and content directly from your monday.com board.

Advanced Filtering Options: Use powerful filters to control which emails trigger actions. Filter emails by subject line, body content, or sender to process only the emails that matter most to your team.

Easy IMAP Configuration: Connect your IMAP email account effortlessly. Customize server settings for both IMAP and SMTP to meet your specific needs.

Use Cases:

We built the IMAP Email Connector to solve the common problem of managing email communications efficiently. Traditional methods of handling emails and updating boards are time-consuming and prone to errors. Our app streamlines this process, making it quick and accurate to integrate email communication into your workflows.

Customer Support Teams: Automatically create support tickets in monday.com when a customer email arrives, ensuring prompt responses and efficient issue tracking.

Sales Teams: Capture leads by creating new items when potential clients reach out via email, keeping your sales pipeline up-to-date.

Project Management: Post updates on project boards when key emails are received or send automated emails when project statuses change.

Human Resources: Automate onboarding processes by triggering actions when HR-related emails are received or send out welcome emails to new hires.

About Us:

We are Deview Studios, a proud monday.com partner committed to enhancing your monday.com experience with innovative solutions!

How to Use:

Users can easily use our app by installing it from the monday.com marketplace - IMAP Email Connector. After installation, integrations can be configured in just a few easy steps. Connect your IMAP email account, set up your desired automations, and let the app handle the rest.

Dependencies:

The IMAP Email Connector does not have any dependencies and seamlessly integrates with your existing monday.com account, regardless of your subscription tier.

posts.author: Valeriia.H (Valeriia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for sharing! For Gmail users looking for a lightweight, no-code solution to create tasks from emails, check out Email to Tasks .
It works inside Gmail, lets you pre-define fields via presets, and sends tasks directly to your monday board.
